tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the main documentation to understand QAI - a quiz-based learning platform with AI coaching.

tour.title: Frontend Entry Point
tour.description: The Next.js app entry handles authentication state, renders global dialogs, and mounts the AI study coach widget.

tour.title: Quiz Gameplay Flow
tour.description: The play page orchestrates quiz sessions - loading questions, tracking answers, and computing scores.

tour.title: State Management
tour.description: Zustand stores manage global state including auth, queries, questions, wildcards, and coach chat.

tour.title: Spring Boot Backend - API Layer
tour.description: REST controllers expose endpoints for quizzes, questions, quiz attempts, and review scheduling.

tour.title: Spring Boot Backend - Services
tour.description: Service classes implement business logic: quiz CRUD, attempt scoring, webhook notifications, and Firestore persistence.

tour.title: AI Coach - WebSocket Chat
tour.description: The AI study coach connects via WebSocket for real-time streaming conversations with the student.

tour.title: AI Coach - Agent & Capabilities
tour.description: The agentic loop orchestrates tool calls, with capabilities for chat, quiz generation, step-solving, and review scheduling.

tour.title: AI Coach - Learning Algorithms
tour.description: SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm schedules reviews, progress tracking analyzes weaknesses, and a scheduler sends notifications.

tour.title: Integration: Webhook & Notifications
tour.description: When a quiz ends, Spring Boot fires a webhook to the AI Coach which updates review schedules and creates notifications.
